decisions.description: Implement a custom ProductVariantPriceUpdateStrategy that propagates price changes across channels with different currencies, replacing the built-in strategy which only syncs same-currency prices.
The custom strategy extends InjectableStrategy so it can inject a currency-conversion rate service (static rate table initially, live service later).
Tax handling in the strategy: strip tax from the source channel price, convert the currency, then reapply the destination channel's tax zone rate using TaxRateService.
Iterate per currency within each channel (not just per channel) to support channels that enable multiple currencies such as EU with EUR and GBP.
Batch conversion-rate lookups inside the strategy to avoid N+1 queries when upserting prices across 30,000+ variant-channel-currency combinations.
Use the createOrUpdateProductVariantPrice method for upsert semantics so the strategy only returns the target values and the framework persists them correctly.
Surface the exchange rates being applied via a custom field on the Channel entity in the Admin UI.

action_items.text: Prototype the custom ProductVariantPriceUpdateStrategy with a static rate table and integration tests against a multi-channel fixture with at least two currencies per channel
Update the Admin UI to expose exchange rates via a Channel custom field
